title: Graph Neural Networks: Deep Learning on Graphs
author: Sage Robinson
AI Researcher
description: Apply neural networks to graph-structured data—but over-smoothing limits depth
content:
GNNs enable learning on non-Euclidean graph data through message passing.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Graph Collapse (2037)](/docs/articles/graph-collapse-2037)
